title: HG Mould Preventor Spray, Non Slip Anti Mould Spray & Bathroom Cleaner Protector, Bathroom Tile Cleaner, Grout & Silicone Seal Guard for Easy Cleaning - 500ml
features: HG Mould Preventor: A convenient non slip anti mould spray that helps to prevent mould from developing, particularly in damp and humid areas such as bathrooms and wet rooms
Stops mould from forming: The easy to use anti mould spray effectively seals surfaces from moisture and air. Mould can no longer develop and your bathroom stays free of mould
Makes cleaning simple: Protects matte or shiny surfaces, making cleaning easier and reducing the need to scrub unsightly mould from grout, silicone seals and other non-porous surfaces
Better for you, better for your family: Mould build-up can put health at risk, so using this spray regularly helps stop it growing. Formula made with 99% naturally sourced ingredients
HG Mould Preventor, 500ml. Discover the HG cleaning products range, from HG mould remover spray to bathroom cleaner, tile cleaner, multi surface cleaners and all purpose cleaner sprays
description: HG Mould Preventor Spray (500ml) HG Mould Preventor is a convenient anti-mould spray that helps to stop mould from developing, making it ideal for bathrooms and other humid or damp places where mould is quick to form. This clever mould protector effectively seals surfaces from moisture and air, so mould can no longer feed and grow, meaning your bathroom stays free from unsightly mould. Features: - Versatile Application: Suitable for glossy and matte surfaces, including: - Tiles - Grouting - Silicone seals and joints - Shower trays and screens - Plastic trims - Other non-porous surfaces - Eco-friendly Ingredients: Made from 99% naturally sourced ingredients. - Wide Coverage: 500ml treats 10-12 m². Includes: - 1 x HG Mould Preventor spray (500ml) How to Use: 1. Prepare the Surface: Remove any existing mould using HG Mould Remover first. 2. Clean and Dry the surface. 3. Spray on HG Mould Preventor and leave to dry for approximately 30-60 minutes. 4. For Smooth Surfaces: Rub within 10 minutes of applying. 5. Repeat Every 2 Months for ongoing protection. Safety Information: - Keep out of children’s reach. - Always read the label and use biocides safely. Explore the HG professional range of specialist household cleaning products, including HG mould remover foam spray, HG limescale remover, tile grout cleaner, multi-purpose cleaners, and all-surface cleaner sprays for your home, office, or outdoor space
